targets.notes: Stated goal/claim of carbon neutrality for corporate operations; details on baselines and use of offsets/removals not specified here.

targets.boundary: entire carbon footprint (products and supply chain)
targets.notes: Plan to cut emissions ~75% vs 2015 and address remaining emissions with carbon removal/credits to reach carbon neutrality by 2030.
targets.title: Apple 2030: Carbon neutral across entire footprint
